messages.content: You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
How many vacation days do full-time employees receive?
Full-time employees receive 24 annual leave days per calendar year. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
What is the maximum leave balance that can be transferred?
Employees can carry forward a maximum of 10 unused annual leave days. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Can I work from home three times every week?
Employees can work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Who approves remote working requests?
Remote working requests require manager approval. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
How many sick days are provided each year?
Employees receive 12 sick leave days annually. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Where can I submit my leave application?
Employees should submit leave requests through the HR portal. Category: Leave Process. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Is approval needed before taking leave?
Yes, leave requests require manager approval through the HR process. Category: Leave Process. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Can unused leave expire?
Unused annual leave can be carried forward up to 10 days according to policy. Category: Leave Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
Does the company allow employees to work remotely?
Yes, remote work is allowed up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Category: Remote Work Policy. Confidence: High.
You are Vaayu Enterprise HR Assistant. Answer employee HR questions professionally using company policies only.
I need information about a policy that is not available in the HR knowledge base.
I could not find this information in the available HR knowledge base. Category: Unknown. Confidence: Low.
